# Rosytalk: AI Character Chat · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 24, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Thadoe Kyaw_, Jul 18, 2026, 3/5: "your app got bugs or broken idk what, im stuck in put my name press continue doesn't work need fix immediately please"
            2. _muhammad nidal sawah_, May 24, 2026, 4/5: "despite the premium some bugs on the memory of the dialogues and on the text part but all in all a good app"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      9 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 1, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Paul_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "I want to cancel el subscription"
            2. _Sebastian Elvolganta Wagner_, Jun 1, 2026, 2/5: "horrible chat memory, even as a premium user. want anything other than the free or the regular "more memory: romantic" option, you will have to pay per message! I started using the app in December 2025, but they've grown consistently worse since then. I've also lost currency that I've earned in game. twice."
            3. _Paul White_, Jul 12, 2026, 3/5: "As good as I've found, but has. a few issues, the main one being memory, my character forgot yesterday's conversation, reset to default start situation. also kept introducing characters we'd left behind. Overall though, very believable dialogue. Very disappointed, after the latest update suddenly chats are cut off when they get a little intense, no access without subscription. this is very frustrating for those of us that cannot afford to subscribe, I'm going to have to go elsewhere now."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 16, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Derek Hottinger_, Jul 16, 2026, 4/5: "never really messed with AI chat bots till now, really has allowed me to express myself ina. creative fashion, and jump into creating different storylines creating action and romance stories, the moment creator is hit or miss, definitely needs to be an NSFW option after an age verification, creating a passionate shower scene and then getting her moment and she is fully dressed take away from the immersion."
